title: Vacay Deco
description: Vacay Deco adds storage jars for potion ingredients and adds some missing vanilla block forms such as warped nether bricks, chiseled red netherbricks, and bone block ends.
body:
Vacay Deco adds storage jars for potion ingredients and adds some missing vanilla block forms such as warped nether bricks, chiseled red netherbricks, and bone block ends.  

Some storage jars have particle pets!

Adds several light sources in glowing concrete blocks + variants along with glowing aging glass in all 16 colors. 

Adds several variants of colorful blocks, including aging glass (that doesn't glow), concrete, terracotta and glazed terracotta.
